title: ClinicalTrials.gov registry-integrity atlas: code, processed summaries and figures
description: Analysis code, processed aggregate summaries and figures underlying the Synthesis Research Article 'Auditing the public clinical-trials record: a registry-integrity atlas of registration, reporting and completion gaps' (Andrew Woo, 2026). Source: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 full-registry snapshot of 29 March 2026 (578,109 studies). Software/data author: Mahmood Ahmad (automated analysis pipeline); the paper author (A. Woo) differs from the software author. MIT (code) / CC BY 4.0 (data, figures).
